name: droplet-workspace
description: Provision a DigitalOcean droplet through the Codex DigitalOcean App and add it as a Codex remote SSH workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Provision a DigitalOcean droplet as a Codex remote SSH workspace.
interface.longDescription: Creates a DigitalOcean Codex droplet using the installed Codex DigitalOcean App, uploads an SSH key, creates and polls the droplet, then configures local SSH access.
